ItacPersonItem.Notes: Tassoni presented his `Filippiche` to the Accademia degli Umoristi, according to Russo (1979). He was Prince of the Accademia in 1606-07. According to Alemanno (1995), in this Academy he delivered two presentations: `In biasimo delle lettere`, and `Encomio sopra il Boia`. The 1st edition of his `La secchia rapita` (Paris, 1622) was signed using his pseudonym.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
